code:
%% Circuit Breaker Pattern - Fault Tolerance %% Version: 1.0.0 %% Date: 2025-10-27 %% Description: Circuit breaker pattern for webhook delivery and external service calls stateDiagram-v2 [*] --> Closed: Initial State Closed --> Open: Failure Threshold Exceeded
(5 failures in 60s) Closed --> Closed: Successful Request
(Reset failure count) Closed --> Closed: Failed Request
(Increment failure count) Open --> HalfOpen: Timeout Elapsed
(30s wait period) Open --> Open: Request Attempted
(Fail fast, don't call service) HalfOpen --> Closed: Test Request Successful
(Reset circuit) HalfOpen --> Open: Test Request Failed
(Back to open state) HalfOpen --> HalfOpen: Waiting for Test
(Limited requests allowed) note right of Closed CLOSED STATE - All requests flow through - Monitor failure rate - Track response times - Increment error counter end note note right of Open OPEN STATE - Block all requests - Return cached response - Or return error immediately - Wait for timeout period - Log all blocked attempts end note note right of HalfOpen HALF-OPEN STATE - Allow test requests - Limited throughput - Monitor success rate - Quick transition decision end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为webhook交付系统画一个熔断器模式的状态图。核心是有三个状态：Closed、Open和HalfOpen。初始状态是Closed，所有请求正常通过。
明白。那从Closed转到Open的触发条件是什么？是固定失败次数还是时间窗口内的失败率？
是60秒内累计5次失败就触发。这个阈值要标注在状态迁移线上。另外Closed状态本身有两个自循环：成功请求重置失败计数，失败请求则递增计数。
好的，Closed状态的结构我清楚了。那Open状态的行为呢？它怎么转到HalfOpen？
Open状态要等待30秒后才能进入HalfOpen。这期间如果收到请求直接快速失败，不调用下游服务。HalfOpen是试探阶段，只允许有限请求通过。
HalfOpen的两个出口我理一下：测试成功就Reset circuit回到Closed，测试失败就Back to open state对吧？还有Waiting for Test的自循环？
对，完全正确。另外三个状态都需要右侧注释说明详细行为。Closed要强调监控失败率和响应时间，Open要说明返回缓存或立即报错，HalfOpen突出快速决策。
完成了。我检查了所有迁移线：从[*]到Closed的初始进入，Closed到Open的阈值触发，Open到HalfOpen的超时恢复，以及HalfOpen的双向出口。三个状态的注释也按你要求的位置放在右侧。
